title: 生产前最终确认
theme: 从 final confirmation / order summary / production start 开始
goals: 能在生产前发送清晰的订单确认清单，减少生产错误
能确认数量、规格、Logo 文件、包装方式、唛头和付款状态
能在客户确认后自然推进 production start，并说明修改截止点

review.title: Day 15 复习
items: 昨天练了 trial order、below MOQ、higher unit price、stock option、mixed order 和 repeat order。
今天进入生产跟进阶段：客户下单后，开产前必须把所有细节做 final confirmation。
生产前确认不是重复聊天，而是防止数量、颜色、logo、包装、唛头和付款信息出错。

preview.scenario: 客户已经确认价格并准备生产。你需要在开产前发一份 order summary，让客户确认数量、颜色、规格、Logo artwork、包装、唛头、付款和交期。
needToKnow: final confirmation 是生产前最后一次确认，不要只问 Can we start production?
order summary 要像清单一样清楚，方便客户逐项确认。
production start 前要提醒客户：确认后再修改，可能会影响时间和费用。

vocabulary.usage: 用于生产、付款或出货前最后一次确认重要信息。
vocabulary.example: Please check the details below for final confirmation.

vocabulary.meaning: 订单摘要 / 订单汇总
vocabulary.usage: 用于把数量、价格、规格、包装和交期集中列给客户确认。
vocabulary.example: I will send you the order summary before production.

vocabulary.usage: 用于确认生产涉及的规格、颜色、工艺、包装和唛头。
vocabulary.example: Please confirm the production details before we start.

vocabulary.meaning: 已确认的设计稿 / 已批准的图稿
vocabulary.usage: 用于说明 logo、包装或印刷文件已被客户确认。
vocabulary.example: We will produce the logo based on the approved artwork.

vocabulary.usage: 用于确认单个包装、内盒、外箱、袋装或特殊包装要求。
vocabulary.example: Please confirm the packing method before production.

vocabulary.usage: 用于出货箱上的客户标识、箱号、目的港或订单号确认。
vocabulary.example: We need your shipping mark confirmation before carton printing.

vocabulary.meaning: 付款确认 / 到账确认
vocabulary.usage: 用于确认定金、尾款或付款凭证后再安排生产或出货。
vocabulary.example: We can arrange production after payment confirmation.

vocabulary.usage: 用于说明客户最终确认后工厂开始生产。
vocabulary.example: After your final confirmation, we will arrange production start.

sentences.label: 发送最终确认
sentences.natural: Please check the details below for final confirmation.
sentences.business: Please check the order summary below for final confirmation before we arrange production start.

sentences.label: 确认生产细节
sentences.natural: Please confirm the production details before we start.
sentences.business: Please confirm the production details, including quantity, color, size, logo, packing method, and shipping mark.

sentences.label: 按确认图稿生产
sentences.natural: We will use the approved artwork for production.
sentences.business: We will produce the logo based on the approved artwork, so please confirm if the file is final.

sentences.label: 确认付款后开产
sentences.natural: We can arrange production after payment confirmation.
sentences.business: After payment confirmation and final details approval, we will arrange production start immediately.

sentences.label: 提醒确认后修改影响
sentences.natural: After final confirmation, changes may affect the lead time.
sentences.business: Please note that after final confirmation and production start, any change may affect the lead time and extra cost.

chatAnalysis.problem: 太模糊，客户不知道具体要确认哪些项目，也容易漏掉包装或唛头。
chatAnalysis.better: Please check the details below for final confirmation.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: Please confirm the production details, including quantity, color, size, logo, packing method, and shipping mark.

chatAnalysis.problem: 表达太硬，也没有说明还需要 final details approval。
chatAnalysis.better: We can arrange production after payment confirmation.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: After payment confirmation and final details approval, we will arrange production start immediately.

chatAnalysis.problem: 容易让客户觉得被拒绝，应该说明修改会影响时间和费用。
chatAnalysis.better: After final confirmation, changes may affect the lead time.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: Please note that after final confirmation and production start, any change may affect the lead time and extra cost.

dialogues.title: 慢速基础版：发送订单汇总

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Please check the order summary below for final confirmation.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Okay, what details do we need to confirm?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Please confirm the quantity, color, logo, packing method, and shipping mark.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Sure, I will check and confirm today.

dialogues.title: 正常商务版：确认图稿和包装

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you start production now?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: We can arrange production start after final confirmation.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: What is still pending?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: We still need your confirmation on the approved artwork and packing method.

dialogues.title: 压力场景版：客户临时想改细节

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We may change the logo size after production starts.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Please note that after final confirmation and production start, any change may affect the lead time and extra cost.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Then please wait for our final approval.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: No problem. We will wait for your final confirmation before arranging production start.

longDialogues.title: 长对话实战：开产前逐项确认订单细节

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Hi, before we arrange production start, I would like to confirm the order summary with you.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Okay, please send the details.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: The order quantity is 1,000 pieces, matte black finish, with your logo by engraving. Is that correct?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Yes, the quantity and finish are correct.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: For the logo, we will produce based on the approved artwork you confirmed yesterday.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you send the artwork one more time?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. I will send the approved artwork again for your final confirmation.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please also confirm the packing method.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: The packing method is one piece in one poly bag, then 100 pieces per carton.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can we use a white inner box instead of a poly bag?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes, but the inner box may affect the packing cost and carton size.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please update the packing cost if we use the inner box.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: No problem. I will check the updated packing cost and confirm it before production.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: What about the shipping mark?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: We need your shipping mark confirmation before carton printing.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: I will send the shipping mark file today.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Thank you. After we receive it, we will add it to the final order summary.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Have you received our deposit?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Our finance team is checking it now. We can arrange production after payment confirmation.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can production start tomorrow?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: If we receive payment confirmation and final details approval today, we can arrange production start tomorrow.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: After production starts, can we still change the logo size?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Please note that after final confirmation and production start, any change may affect the lead time and extra cost.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Understood. We will check everything carefully today.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Thank you. Please confirm the approved artwork, packing method, shipping mark, and payment status.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Once we confirm all details, can you send us the production schedule?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes. After final confirmation, I will send you the production schedule and estimated ready date.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Okay, please wait for our confirmation.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. We will wait for your final confirmation before arranging production start.

exercises.prompt: 中译英：请检查下面的订单汇总，做最终确认。
exercises.answer: Please check the order summary below for final confirmation.
acceptable: please check the order summary below for final confirmation
please check the below order summary for final confirmation
exercises.hint: order summary 是订单汇总，final confirmation 是最终确认。

exercises.prompt: 把这句话改得更自然：confirm all details
exercises.answer: Please confirm the production details, including quantity, color, size, logo, packing method, and shipping mark.
acceptable: please confirm the production details including quantity color size logo packing method and shipping mark
please confirm the production details including quantity color size logo packaging method and shipping mark
exercises.hint: 要把具体项目列出来，不要只说 all details。

exercises.prompt: 填空：We will produce the logo based on the approved ____.
exercises.hint: approved artwork 是已确认的设计稿。

exercises.prompt: 客户问什么时候可以开产，哪个回复更适合？
options: After payment confirmation and final details approval, we will arrange production start immediately.
exercises.answer: After payment confirmation and final details approval, we will arrange production start immediately.
acceptable: after payment confirmation and final details approval we will arrange production start immediately
exercises.hint: 开产前需要 payment confirmation 和 final details approval。

exercises.prompt: 中译英：生产开始后，任何修改都可能影响交期和额外费用。
exercises.answer: After production start, any change may affect the lead time and extra cost.
acceptable: after production start any change may affect the lead time and extra cost
after production starts any change may affect the lead time and extra cost
exercises.hint: 不要说 cannot change，用 may affect lead time and extra cost。

exercises.prompt: 客户说：Can you start production tomorrow? 你应该怎么回复？
exercises.answer: If we receive payment confirmation and final details approval today, we can arrange production start tomorrow.
acceptable: if we receive payment confirmation and final details approval today we can arrange production start tomorrow
if we get payment confirmation and final details approval today we can arrange production start tomorrow

homework: 把 final confirmation、order summary、production details、approved artwork、packing method、shipping mark confirmation、payment confirmation、production start 各造 1 句。
用今天的词写一份生产前 WhatsApp 确认清单，至少包含 quantity、finish、logo、packing method、shipping mark 和 payment confirmation。
跟读长对话 2 遍，重点练 if we receive payment confirmation and final details approval today。
tomorrow: Day 17 会练客户催单和紧急订单，重点是安抚客户、推动工厂，但不乱承诺。
